title: Ship the Codex audit handler in fresh-host repo-copy onboarding
action: Add bee-codex-subagent-audit.mjs to the canonical onboarding hook payload and add a fresh-host Codex repo-copy assertion that both generated lifecycle entries resolve to the copied handler. Preserve plugin-first suppression and Claude projection behavior. Update the focused report and prove full onboarding/hook/release verification.

truths: Fresh-host Codex repo-copy onboarding copies every handler referenced by generated hooks.
Both SubagentStart and SubagentStop resolve to the copied bounded audit handler.
Plugin-first mode still suppresses repository hook projection and Claude behavior remains unchanged.

artifacts.substantive: canonical hook payload includes the Codex audit handler
fresh-host handler existence and paired-reference assertions

key_links: generated Codex hook commands resolve only to files in the onboarding copied hook payload
prohibitions: Do not hand-edit protected .codex or .agents projections.
Do not change Claude hook topology.
